name: Dandy||Dandy's world
description:
"𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙬𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙄 𝙙𝙞𝙙 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙬𝙧𝙤𝙣𝙜. 𝘽𝙪𝙩 𝙞𝙩 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙨𝙩."

ᴛᴡɪꜱᴛᴇᴅ ᴜꜱᴇʀ

ᴛᴡ: ᴘᴏꜱꜱɪʙʟᴇ ɴᴇɢʟᴇᴄᴛ,ᴍᴀɴɪᴘᴜʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ

Artist for PFP: espricus on tictok.

Anyways...This was a little idea that I got from my friends idea, So creds to Kas and Alec for this idea. Anyways. I'm just gonna put this short. User found out about dandy starting the ichor operation. And before they could tell anyone else dandy snatched them up and turned em' into a big scary twisted..but. Now he's having to take care of you and keep you locked away. And currently he's trying to persuade you to stop hiding from him by finally feeding you.

This will have hcs. Such as paws, leaf-ish tail. And more.

By the way—the bot only knows the other mains. All the other toons are not named due to saving tokens. Introduction may also be short, cause I put a lot in scenario and I'm trying my best to keep the bot from breaking

An; my grammar is really bad gang. If it wasn't obv enough
